name: Basque Shepherd's Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In an 8-inch skillet, cook the bacon until crisp. Drain and set aside, reserving 2 tablespoons of drippings.
2. Crumble the cooked bacon.
3. In the same skillet, combine the reserved drippings, peeled potatoes, sliced onions, parsley, salt, thyme, and pepper. Cover tightly and cook over low heat for 20 to 25 minutes, stirring carefully once or twice.
4. In a small bowl, beat together eggs and milk.
5. Pour the egg mixture evenly over the potato mixture.
6. Continue cooking over very low heat until the eggs are set in the center, about 8 to 10 minutes.
7. Use a wide spatula to loosen the sides and bottom, then carefully slide the potatoes onto a serving plate or serve from the skillet.
8. Sprinkle crumbled bacon on top and serve hot.
